steps.title: Use the fire threshold
steps.content: The team's conclusion depends on whether artifacts were exposed to temperatures above 400 degrees Celsius, the typical temperature campfires reach. Evidence supporting the conclusion should identify artifacts with exposure clearly above that threshold.

steps.title: Select above-threshold data
steps.content: Choice A names artifacts that do not both clear the 400-degree threshold. Choice C uses 100 degrees, which is not the fire-control standard. Choice D compares two artifacts without showing campfire-level exposure. The remaining choice gives two artifacts around 550 and 650 degrees. The answer is B.
